title: Ad PIDS-Pack [MTR 4/JCM]
description: This resource pack adds numerous PIDS for advertising to the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod. It is only useable for MTR 4 and must be used with the Joban Client Mod (JCM v2), otherwise the pack will not work.
body:
This is a resource pack containing JavaScript scripts. It is only useable for MTR 4 and must be used with the Joban Client Mod (JCM), otherwise the pack will not work.

Its purpose is to add PIDS to MTR, which can then be used to create advertising screens.

<details>
<summary>Tutorial</summary>
<hr>
Add custom Ads to the PIDS
<hr>
  
 - Unzip the Resource Pack
 - Create own png-files with a tool like paint
 - Save all Ads in `assets/ads/'the pids you're using'`

**Tip: Use a separate Resource Pack for your Ads**

Instead of unzipping and editing this pack directly, it is highly recommended to create your own separate resource pack for your custom images. This prevents your ads from being deleted when you update this pack. Just mirror the folder structure (e.g., `assets/ads/1x1/`) in your custom pack.

<hr>
Activate Ads on PIDS
<hr>

 - Place a `PIDS Projector`
 - Right-Click it with the brush
 - Write `ads: ` + `the name of your files (without .png)` in one of the `custom message`-fields

<hr>
Activate a special Ad, when a train is arriving
<hr>

 - Place a `PIDS Projector`
 - Right-Click it with the brush
 - Write `ad_arriving: ` + `the name of your file (without .png)` in one of the `custom message`-fields
</details>
